allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''force_push blocked:'''', not p[''''allow_force_pushes''''][''''enabled'''']\); print\(''''deletion blocked:'''', not p[''''allow_deletions''''][''''enabled'''']\); print\(''''required checks:'''', [c[''''context''''] for c in p[''''required_status_checks''''][''''contexts'''']]\)")
